utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each one includes the required details: health_coverage specifies physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents coverage with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. All fields are fully specified and contain cost-related information, even if some costs are included in the base plan.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan specifies a single core health insurance policy: 'HealthFirst Standard Comprehensive Plan with Premium Medical Network Addon.' The base name 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' appears in the ground-truth ratings under both the physical and mental health categories. The 'Premium Medical Network Addon' corresponds to an additional service listed under travel_enhancement_services with a rating of 10. The property_coverage and travel_coverage are both included in the same HealthFirst plan, meaning they share the HealthFirst Standard Plan rating. Therefore, the relevant items from the ground-truth ratings are: 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (physical health rating 7), 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (mental health rating 6), and 'Premium Medical Network' (rating 10).
